requirement_text: When a registered user submits the login form with a valid email and correct password, the system shall authenticate the user and redirect them to their personal dashboard. A session token shall be created and stored securely.

When a user submits the login form with a valid email but an incorrect password, the system shall display a generic error message without revealing whether the email exists. The failed attempt shall be logged, and the password field shall be cleared.

An administrator user shall be able to permanently delete any project from the system. Before deletion, the system shall display a confirmation dialog. Upon confirmation, the project and all its tasks shall be removed, and all project members shall receive a notification.

A user creating a new task shall be able to leave the assignee field blank. The task shall be saved successfully in an unassigned state and shall appear in the team's unassigned task view. The assignee may be set at any time after creation.

When a user attempts to register with an email address that is already associated with an existing account, the system shall display a clear error message indicating the email is already in use. The existing account shall not be modified.

A user who has forgotten their password shall be able to request a password reset link via email. The link shall expire after 60 minutes and may only be used once. Upon successful reset, the old password shall be invalidated immediately.

A user with the 'member' role shall not be able to access the admin dashboard. Any attempt to navigate to an admin URL shall result in an access-denied response, a redirect to the user's own dashboard, and the attempt shall be recorded in the audit log.

The task search feature shall correctly handle queries that contain special characters including quotes, angle brackets, ampersands, and SQL metacharacters. Results shall be returned safely and the search term shall be displayed back to the user without modification to the original input intent.
The system should send notifications to users.
Users can upgrade their account to premium to unlock additional features.
